name: leanrs-em-credit-analyst
description: Rating-agency-style EM credit research on 200+ USD corporate issuers using the Emerging Markets Data by LeanRS MCP — six notes covering credit strengths, debt structure, cash flow, EBITDA quality, FX mismatch, and financial policy.

plugins.name: leanrs-em-credit-analyst
plugins.description: Six rating-agency-style credit notes for EM / HY corporate issuers: credit strengths & competitive position, debt structure & liquidity, run-rate cash flow & FCF, EBITDA adjustments & earnings quality, currency mismatch & FX leverage, financial policy & capital allocation.
